title: MLB Proposes $245 Million Salary Cap That Players Union Rejects
title_cn: MLB 提议 2.45 亿美元薪资上限，遭球员工会拒绝
summary:
Major League Baseball proposed a salary cap for the first time in more than three decades, a move opposed by the players union and likely to ignite tension between the two sides ahead of negotiations over a new labor deal.

The league’s proposal would cap team spending at about $245 million and put a salary floor at roughly $171 million, according to a document provided by MLB. The current collective bargaining agreement between the league and players is set to expire in December, leading to speculation there could be a disruption to the 2027 season as the two sides hash out payroll structure.  In 1994, the owners pushed for a salary cap, and the Major League Baseball Players Association went on strike during the second half of the season. The impasse led to a big chunk of games and the World Series being canceled.

Randall Williams, Bloomberg News Business of Sports Reporter, joins Intelligence Radio for a closer look. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Prices Soften as Traders Bet on Renewal of US-Iran Truce

title: Stocks Rise as Trump Says He’ll Make Call on Iran

Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks toward a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.
Brian Belski, CEO and CIO at Humilis Investment Strategies, discusses the S&P 500 bull case and his outlook for markets amid the AI boom. (Source: Bloomberg)

They discuss the return-to-office boom, hospitality-driven workplaces, and why restaurants have become a key tool for attracting talent and premium tenants. (Source: Bloomberg)

Gap Inc. CEO Richard Dickson says the retailer delivered progress in the quarter, even after lowering its sales outlook. He says three out of their four brands are growing and they're raising the earnings outlook. Dickson speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kenya Inflation Heats Up After Iran-Driven Fuel Hikes Fan Unrest
title_cn: 伊朗推动的燃油上涨引发球迷骚乱后肯尼亚通胀升温
summary: Kenya’s inflation rate rose by the most in more than two years, after higher fuel costs driven by the war in Iran added to price pressures and spurred deadly protests last week.

title: A City-Backed Grocery Store in Atlanta Offers a Model for Mamdani
title_cn: 亚特兰大一家由城市支持的杂货店为 Mamdani 提供了一个模型
summary:
Food prices have become the animating issue in one of New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s signature policies: a plan to open city-owned grocery stores.

Azalea Fresh Market's CEO Paul Nair joins Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith on the Everybody's Business podcast to discuss the popular city-backed grocery store in Atlanta and how it's serving as a model for Mamdani’s grocery store plan.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Paves Way for Onshore Crypto-Linked Perpetual Futures
title_cn: 美国为境内加密货币永续期货铺平道路

title: Fed’s Bowman Says Too Soon to Judge Iran War Inflation Impact
title_cn: 美联储鲍曼表示判断伊朗战争通胀影响还为时过早
summary: Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Michelle Bowman said, “I would like to have more clarity on the economic impacts from the conflict in the Middle East and the durability of those effects,” and thinks it’s too soon to judge the inflationary impact from the Iran war. Bowman said Friday at a central banking conference in Iceland that that policymakers need to look through temporary price shocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What’s Behind the Blue Origin Rocket Explosion?
title_cn: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸背后的原因是什么？

title: Gap Lowers Sales Outlook; Dell Soars on AI Demand | Stock Movers
title_cn: 差距降低了销售前景；戴尔因人工智能需求而飙升 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Dell (DELL) shares are soaring after the company gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.
- Gap (GAP) shares plunged after the company lowered its sales outlook due to struggles with its product mix.
- NetApp (NTAP) shares jumped after the data storage provider reported its latest earnings. Analyst say the report is a strong print from the company, showing strong growth, with upgrades to consensus expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danish Pension Blacklists SpaceX Over ‘Catastrophic Governance’
title_cn: 丹麦养老金因“灾难性治理”将 SpaceX 列入黑名单

title: Autodesk CEO Says MaintainX Acquisition Presents Exciting Opportunity

summary: Autodesk President and CEO Andrew Anagnost details the company's $3.6 billion acquisition of MaintainX, emphasizing that the deal represents a strategic move to extend Autodesk's offerings from design and manufacturing into the operational phase of the built environment lifecycle. He speaks with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Markets Are Betting Big on AI. This Harvard Professor Isn’t So Sure
title_cn: 市场对人工智能下了大注。这位哈佛大学教授不太确定
summary:
With markets near record highs, driven by demand for artificial intelligence, it certainly seems that investors are betting big on AI growth.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Gita Gopinath — Harvard economics professor and the former first deputy managing director of the IMF — joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway to discuss the possibility of a perfectly productive world driven by AI, free of social unrest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Semiconductor Stocks in 'Mother of All Supercycles,' NewEdge's Dawson Says
title_cn: NewEdge 的道森表示，半导体股票处于“所有超级周期之母”
summary: NewEdge Weath CIO Cameron Dawson discusses the outlook for semiconductor stocks during an interview with Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Norway Wealth Fund Backs Human Rights Review at Palantir

title: Dell Soars Most in Two Years on Outlook Fueled by AI Servers

summary: Dell Technologies Inc. shares surged the most in two years on Friday after the hardware maker gave an outlook for annual sales that far surpassed analysts’ estimates, fueled by demand for servers that power artificial intelligence work.

title: A Brand Built on Truth: NASA in the Generative Era

(Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Earnings a Cushion for US Equity Markets, HSBC’s Kettner Says
title_cn: 汇丰银行的凯特纳表示，科技股盈利为美国股市提供缓冲
summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, says the strength of tech earnings “made us care a little less about higher yields.” He speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former SocGen Chair says Bank's Governance is 'Best in Class'
title_cn: 法国兴业银行前主席表示该银行的治理是“同类最佳”
summary: The former Chair of Société Générale, Lorenzo Bini Smaghi, has stepped down after more than a decade at the helm. Bini Smaghi says he leaves the lender with 'best in class' governance and a share price 60% higher than when he joined. But he added that the restructuring is not fully over and there are big deals to come. Bini Smaghi joined Lizzy Burden on 'The Pulse'. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Used to Be Generative. Now It’s All About Agents
title_cn: 人工智能曾经是生成性的。现在一切都与代理有关
summary: Corporate speak has changed when it comes to describing the evolving technology

title: Ocado Reaches Deal to Upgrade Asda’s Online Sales Systems

summary: Ocado Group Plc struck a deal to help British grocer Asda lift online sales, a boost for the company’s automated technology after a series of setbacks.

title: It’s Summertime and AI Means Internships Aren’t Easy
title_cn: 暑假来临，人工智能意味着实习并不容易
summary: With chatbots like Claude around, more companies are cutting back on internships.

title: The Nightmare of Finding a Summer Internship in the Age of AI
title_cn: 人工智能时代寻找暑期实习的噩梦
summary: An important rite of passage for college students is slipping away as companies use AI for more busywork and prepare for a future with fewer entry-level positions.

title: Jupiter Fund Taps Europe AI Energy Boom to Beat 91% of Peers
title_cn: Jupiter 基金利用欧洲人工智能能源热潮击败 91% 的同行
summary: Homing in on stocks at the heart of Europe’s electrification push has helped a Jupiter Asset Management fund team outperform 91% of its peers this year.

title: Principal's Shah: We Don't See Markets Repricing Fed Cuts
title_cn: 校长沙阿：我们没有看到市场重新定价美联储降息
summary: Seema Shah, Chief Global Strategist at Principal Asset Management, discusses the outlook for bond yields, equities pricing and Federal Reserve Policy. "It's gonna be important to watch how the bond yield market progresses," Shah says on Bloomberg Television. "From our perspective, though, we don't expect to see markets repricing Fed cuts." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Themes to Watch at Asia’s Biggest AI Tech Show
title_cn: 亚洲最大的人工智能科技展值得关注的关键主题
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s Jensen Huang leads a parade of AI computing leaders in Taiwan for Asia’s biggest technology showcase, Computex. Over a jam-packed week, the hardware linchpins of the post-ChatGPT era will debate the most pressing issues facing their industry, from growing bottlenecks in the supply of essential components like memory chips to the rise of challengers to Nvidia at the apex of the semiconductor hierarchy.

title: Lenovo Doubles in Best Month Since 1999 on AI-Fueled Rally
title_cn: 人工智能推动股价上涨，联想股价实现 1999 年以来最佳月度翻倍
summary: Lenovo Group Ltd. recorded its best month in more than a quarter-century, with the stock doubling in May as investor enthusiasm built around the company’s AI-driven growth outlook.

title: Gita Gopinath on Why Interest Rates Have Surged All Around the World | Odd Lots
title_cn: 吉塔·戈皮纳特 (Gita Gopinath) 谈全球利率飙升的原因零股
summary: There's been a massive selloff in the bond market and rates are rising globally. Japan, Korea, the UK... You name it. Gita Gopinath — Harvard economics professor and the former first deputy managing director of the IMF — has long warned that bond markets are "in a fragile place." She sees a combo of demographics, high levels of public debt, and the intense capital needs of the AI boom creating inflationary pressure all around the world. Today we speak with Gopinath about the seeming disconnect between stocks and bonds and why investors may be wrong to assume that governments will have their back the next time there's a major shock. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI is Creating More Work for Australia’s Workplace Tribunal
title_cn: 人工智能正在为澳大利亚工作场所法庭创造更多工作
summary: Australia’s Fair Work Commission announced a review of its processes to cope with an influx of cases being lodged with the help of generative AI assistance tools, which it said has contributed to an estimated 70% workload increase over a three-year period.

title: China’s Wuxi Taclink Is Said to Mull Rare Listing in Singapore
title_cn: 传中国无锡德科立考虑在新加坡罕见上市
summary: Wuxi Taclink Optoelectronics Technology Co. is considering a listing in Singapore, a potential first for any company that already trades shares in mainland China, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Rocket Explosion Deals Blow to Blue Origin's Space Ambitions
title_cn: 火箭爆炸交易打击了蓝色起源的太空野心
summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded in a massive fireball while undergoing a test on a Florida launchpad Thursday evening, dealing a major setback to the Jeff Bezos-backed firm in its efforts to challenge a dominant SpaceX. Blue Origin and Amazon founder Jeff Bezos said it was too early to determine the cause of the explosion and described it as "a very rough day" in a post on X. Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Matt Bloxham joined Caroline Hepker to discuss the implications. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HSG Is Said to Be in Lead to Buy Blackstone-Backed Leica Camera
title_cn: 据称 HSG 已率先购买黑石支持的徕卡相机
summary: HSG has emerged as the leading bidder for a stake in German high-end camera maker Leica Camera AG, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Control Risks: Sustainable Peace Outlook in Iran War Poor
title_cn: 控制风险：伊朗战争的可持续和平前景不佳
summary: Control Risks Partner Angela Mancini believes the outlook for a sustainable peace that meets the priorities of the primary threat actors in the Iran war remains very poor. She speaks with Haslinda Amin on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mexico Opens Way to Void Elections After Tweaking Judicial Votes
title_cn: 墨西哥在调整司法投票后开辟了废除选举的道路
summary: Mexican lawmakers approved changes to the way it elects judges meant to address investor worries about judicial independence, just before backing another bill that reignited concerns about the ruling Morena party’s consolidation of power.

title: Trump Says ‘Final Determination’ on Iran Truce Is Coming
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停战“最终决定”即将到来
summary: President Donald Trump said Friday he’s making a “final determination” on a preliminary deal to extend a ceasefire with Iran although mixed messages from both sides over when an agreement might be struck continued to confuse the outlook for a breakthrough.

title: Ships Attacked in Strait of Hormuz This Week, Chevron Says
title_cn: 雪佛龙表示，本周有船只在霍尔木兹海峡遭到袭击
summary: Several vessels transiting through the Strait of Hormuz have been attacked in recent days, underscoring the “very real” risks that remain for shipowners in the Persian Gulf whether or not a peace accord is signed, Chevron Corp. Chief Executive Officer Mike Wirth said.

title: Russia Heads for Showdown With Armenia Over Europe Outreach
title_cn: 俄罗斯将与亚美尼亚就欧洲事务展开摊牌
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin joined a summit of the Moscow-led Eurasian Economic Union on Friday amid growing tensions with Armenia over its shift toward Europe.

title: EU Clears Spain’s €9 Billion Power Capacity Mechanism
title_cn: 欧盟批准西班牙90亿欧元电力容量机制
summary: The European Commission has approved a new €9 billion ($10.5 billion) mechanism for Spain aimed at ensuring electricity supply security in the country.

title: Taiwan Arms Deal Delayed by Trump Is Dominated by Air Defense
title_cn: 特朗普推迟的对台军售交易以防空为主
summary: In-demand Patriot interceptors and a valuable air defense integration system make up more than half of the $14 billion Taiwan weapons deal that has become a flashpoint in broader US-China relations, according to people familiar with the situation.

title: Pentagon’s Asia Command Seeks Weapons Aimed at Deterring China
title_cn: 五角大楼亚洲司令部寻求旨在威慑中国的武器
summary: The US military is quietly seeking to bolster its ability to deter or battle China over Taiwan, including with new warship-killing bombs and advanced sea mines, the head of US Indo-Pacific Command said in a report to Congress.

title: Ebola Border Closures Block Aid Needed to Stop Virus Spread
title_cn: 埃博拉边境关闭阻止了阻止病毒传播所需的援助
summary: Travel restrictions and border closures are hindering the response to Ebola as aid workers say they are battling to get to some of the areas where the outbreak has been the most vicious.

title: Pam Bondi Questioned by House Panel on Handling of Epstein Files
title_cn: 帕姆·邦迪 (Pam ​​Bondi) 接受众议院小组关于处理爱泼斯坦文件的质询
summary: House lawmakers arrived for a closed-door session with former Attorney General Pam Bondi prepared to press her on the Justice Department’s decisions to withhold documents related to accused sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein.

title: Court Halts US Plan for Kenya Ebola Facility on Health Risks
title_cn: 法院因健康风险而叫停美国为肯尼亚埃博拉病毒设施提供的计划
summary: A Kenyan high court temporarily blocked the government from approving a deal with the US to establish an Ebola quarantine facility in the East African nation after a human rights group said the plan posed “grave health risks” to the public.

title: Grocery Shoppers Are In For a Summer of Pain
title_cn: 杂货购物者将经历一个痛苦的夏天
summary: The Iran war’s effects will keep rippling through the supply chain, even if it ends.

title: EU to Unlock €16.4 Billion of Aid to Hungary in Win for Magyar
title_cn: 欧盟将向匈牙利提供164亿欧元援助以赢得马扎尔的胜利
summary: The European Union has reached a deal with Budapest to unlock €16.4 billion ($19.1 billion) in frozen funding for Hungary subject to reforms, offering much-needed relief to the country’s stretched budget.

title: Bulgaria Advances Anti-Graft Law to Unlock €370 Million EU Aid
title_cn: 保加利亚推进反腐败法以获得3.7亿欧元欧盟援助
summary: Bulgarian lawmakers approved on Friday a bill creating an anti-corruption body, a crucial step to unlock hundreds of millions of euros in delayed European Union recovery funding.

title: Iran Hosts Reconstruction, Investment Event Amid Sign of US Deal
title_cn: 伊朗在美国签署协议之际举办重建和投资活动
summary: Iran is hosting an investment and reconstruction conference as it appears to be inching closer to an agreement with the US that could pave the way for a permanent truce with Washington.

title: EU Warns Trade Relationship With China Is ‘Not Sustainable’
title_cn: 欧盟警告与中国的贸易关系“不可持续”
summary: The European Union cautioned that its economic relationship with China must change as the bloc begins considering tougher measures to counteract growing imbalances.

title: Republicans Approach Summer Still Searching for a Win
title_cn: 共和党人临近夏季仍在寻求胜利
summary: The slipping calendar adds to doubts about the party passing another major bill this year

title: The Indian Club That Outlasted The British May Not Survive Modi
title_cn: 比英国人更长久的印度俱乐部可能无法在莫迪手中幸存
summary: The Indian government is pushing to evict the Delhi Gymkhana Club, one of the country’s most storied and exclusive colonial-era social clubs, touching off a fierce fight among the city’s elite — even as it evokes a collective shrug among its young and newly wealthy.

title: College Mergers Take a Long Time. Trump Officials Want to Speed Them Up
title_cn: 大学合并需要很长时间。特朗普官员希望加快速度
summary: The US Department of Education wants to grease the wheels for college mergers and acquisitions, a rare Trump administration proposal with broad support from university leaders who see the policy helping the sector withstand a wave of financial distress.

title: Italy’s Growth Was Robust at Start of 2026 in Surprise Revision
title_cn: 意大利2026年初经济增长强劲 令人意外的修正
summary: Italy’s economy grew more than initially estimated at the start of 2026, keeping up momentum from last year before the shock of the Iran war impacted growth.

title: Magyar on Cusp of Sealing Deal on EU Funds in Hungary Budget Win
title_cn: 马扎尔即将在匈牙利预算案中达成欧盟基金协议
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he expected to reach a deal with the European Union later on Friday that would allow billions of euros in frozen funding to be unlocked, in much-needed relief to the stretched budget.

title: China’s Deepening Embrace of Canada
title_cn: 中国加深对加拿大的拥抱
summary: Foreign Minister Wang Yi’s visit hints at the global realignment now under way.

title: Philippine Court Orders Arrest of Senator Over Graft Scandal
title_cn: 菲律宾法院因贪污丑闻下令逮捕参议员
summary: A Philippine court on Friday ordered the arrest of Senator Jinggoy Estrada after he was charged for allegedly receiving millions of pesos in an infrastructure corruption scheme.

title: Russia Hands Agriculture Tycoon’s Assets to State Bank
title_cn: 俄罗斯将农业大亨的资产交给国家银行
summary: Russia placed the business of Ros Agro Plc, one of the country’s largest agricultural holdings, under the management of a state bank after a Moscow court ordered the nationalization of billionaire Vadim Moshkovich’s share in the company.

title: Australia’s Marles Defends Defense Budget, Welcomes Japan Ties
title_cn: 澳大利亚马尔斯捍卫国防预算，欢迎日本关系
summary: Australia’s deputy prime minister defended the nation’s defense spending ahead of a meeting with his US counterpart, arguing that his country spends a larger share of its economy on the military than Germany, France or the UK.

title: Investors Warm to Pro-Trump Colombian Outsider Ahead of Election
title_cn: 大选前投资者对支持特朗普的哥伦比亚局外人表现出热情
summary: A celebrity attorney who represented some of the nation’s most notorious crime bosses and who refers to himself as “the tiger” has unexpectedly emerged as investors’ best hope of averting a market rout in Colombia.

title: Xi’s US Youth Initiative Hits 50,000 Goal Ahead of Schedule
title_cn: 习近平的美国青年计划提前实现5万目标
summary: China said it has met President Xi Jinping’s goal of bringing 50,000 young Americans to the country ahead of schedule, showcasing a milestone after a Beijing summit with Donald Trump steadied bilateral ties.

title: Netanyahu Says Israel Will Expand Control Over Gaza Strip to 70%
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡称以色列将把对加沙地带的控制权扩大到70%
summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ordered the army to expand its control over Gaza’s territory, further squeezing the war-torn enclave.
